name: Battery Energy Storage (BESS)
description: Scalable Battery Energy Storage Systems for commercial and industrial use (1P-1P and 3P-3P). Up to 30KVA / 36KWh with LCD monitoring.

name: Heavy Duty UPS 1P-1P (Single Phase)
description: Single phase in, single phase out heavy duty UPS with IGBT technology.

name: Pure Sine Wave UPS and UPS with ATC
description: Pure Sine Wave UPS and UPS with ATC Series (1P-1P) for homes, offices and sensitive IT loads. Variable charging 2.5A–25A, built-in isolation transformer, instant changeover.

name: Lift Inverter / ERD
description: Emergency Rescue Device and Lift Inverter for non-regenerative lifts and escalators (3P-3P). IGBT-based, built-in isolation transformer, up to 30KVA / 36KWh.

name: Solar PCU MPPT
description: Solar Power Conditioning Unit with MPPT charge controller (1P-1P). Bi-directional technology, Bluetooth/Wi-Fi monitoring, ATC, up to 10KVA.

name: Solar PCU + Lithium Combo
description: Solar PCU MPPT paired with LiFePO4 battery — solar-first, grid-backup, app monitoring. Ideal for homes and SMEs needing clean solar energy (1P-1P).

name: Heavy Duty UPS 3P-3P (Three Phase)
description: Three phase in, three phase out heavy duty UPS with IGBT technology.

name: Heavy Duty Online UPS (IGBT)
description: Heavy Duty Online UPS with IGBT technology for motors, compressors and IT infrastructure. 1P-1P configurations up to 10KVA.

name: Retrofit LiFePO4 Battery
description: Drop-in LiFePO4 replacement batteries compatible with any existing inverter/UPS brand. Smart BMS, sleep mode, Anderson connector, 3000+ cycle life.

name: Heavy Duty UPS (IGBT)
description: Heavy Duty UPS with IGBT technology for motors, compressors and IT infrastructure. 1P-1P and 3P-3P configurations up to 30KVA.

name: UPS + Lithium Combo
description: Pure Sine Wave UPS bundled with matched LiFePO4 battery for maximum backup and zero maintenance. Ready-to-install combo packs (1P-1P).

name: BESS 1P-1P (Single Phase)
description: Single phase Battery Energy Storage Systems

name: BESS 3P-3P (Three Phase)
description: Three phase Battery Energy Storage Systems
